name: Edo Tensei Sasori (S)
pageTitle: Edo Tensei Sasori (S) - Naruto Arena Classic
description: Edo Tensei Sasori (S) has been resurrected in the ageless body that he had always wanted during his life. He is sent out to the battlefield in Akatsuki's ambush squad.
requirement: Mission: The Puppet Master is Back

skills.name: Chakra Threads
skills.description: Sasori manipulates his puppets, gaining 10 points of destructible defense for 3 turns. During this time, 'Puppet Manipulation' deals 5 additional damage and 'Chakra Threads: Puppet Trap' will reflect all harmful skills instead.

skills.name: Puppet Manipulation
skills.description: Edo Tensei Sasori deals 15 damage to one enemy. For 1 turn, that enemy will deal 10 less non-affliction damage. If the health of that enemy drops to 35 or below, their physical and chakra skills will be stunned for 1 turn.

skills.name: Chakra Threads: Puppet Trap
skills.description: Edo Tensei Sasori targets one ally for 1 turn. The first harmful skill used on that ally will be reflected upon the enemy. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: Falling Guard
skills.description: This skill makes Edo Tensei Sasori (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.
